title: Events
description: This mod will be useful when you are planning to host events.
body: This mod will be useful when you are planning to host events. **Features:** - Putting people in spectator mode when they die. - Changing the world border with 1 click on a button. - More soon! **Make sure to enable the event! Otherwise, none of the features will work. It is off by default.** **Install on both server and client side!**   **Usage:** /eventmenu (Requires OP, there is no specific permission for it) On death, with Event turned on.   On death, with Event turned off.   Spawn the Worldborder, otherwise the Worldborder's presets will not work. /worldborder center (X) (Z) /worldborder set (number)   Example of the presets. Duration of the Worldborder to complete shrinking/expanding is always 60 seconds.     Beta: This mod is in beta and does not have many features, I will be working on more!
